title: Building hsdis for OpenJDK 15
summary: Lately I’ve been fascinated by the possibility to analyse the assembly code emitted by the Java JIT (just-in-time) compiler. So far I had only looked only into Java class files using javap ; diving into the world of assembly code feels a bit like Alice must have felt when falling down the rabbit whole into wonderland.
